text: This review focuses on the self-assembly of concave bis-monodentate ligands with square-planar metal cations into discrete [M<sub>n</sub>L<sub>2n</sub>] cage structures. It focuses primarily on simple topologies, including knots and interpenetrated dimers.
explanation: The sentence uses legitimate chemistry jargon and plausible composition; however, its brevity and generic structure without unique identifiers leave room for AI or human authorship.
